So I framed my questioning around the different types of audiences that they wanted to reach, and how one message for one audience is not going to resonate with the other audience.

What are they reading?
What's really interesting to them?

That, like, single headline or whatever that we want them to walk away with.
So I broke it down into kind of tiers of messaging that were specific to each of the different audiences.
